overview: Queen Care is a premium Arabic RTL beauty center app for skin and hair care services. It features a luxurious minimal design with a warm beige and gold palette, offering clients an elegant way to browse services and book appointments via WhatsApp.
features: Arabic RTL interface throughout all screens
WhatsApp booking form with pre-filled messages
Contact page with location and clickable phone/WhatsApp links
Minimal premium design with beige, gold, and purple palette
